narrative: USD mixed as Iran's closure of the Strait of Hormuz drives crude lower — risk appetite split; commodity bloc (AUD, CAD) bid while safe-haven JPY demand muted. EUR/USD holds at 1.1767 — Fed-ECB 175bp differential limits upside; ECB ON HOLD removes near-term cut risk. Gold higher +1.48% on safe-haven demand amid equity gains +1.20%; VIX at 17.5. USD/JPY pressured at 158.58 as JPY's safe-haven function appears compromised — USD/JPY and VIX moving in tandem.
